trans-unit.source: The packaged app manifest does not declare a valid <Identity Name="..." Publisher="..." /> element.
trans-unit.target: The packaged app manifest does not declare a valid <Identity Name="..." Publisher="..." /> element.

trans-unit.source: Deploys a packaged Windows (UWP/WinUI) test host to an isolated directory and launches it from there.
trans-unit.target: Развертывает упакованный узел тестирования Windows (UWP/WinUI) в изолированном каталоге и запускает его оттуда.
Средство запуска узла тестирования упакованных приложений

trans-unit.source: Cannot launch the packaged Windows app '{0}' (found '{1}'). Launching a packaged (MSIX) app requires registering the layout with the PackageManager and activating it by Application User Model ID, which this extension does not implement yet (see https://github.com/microsoft/testfx/issues/2784). Only non-packaged (loose-layout) test hosts can be launched today.
trans-unit.target: Cannot launch the packaged Windows app '{0}' (found '{1}'). Launching a packaged (MSIX) app requires registering the layout with the PackageManager and activating it by Application User Model ID, which this extension does not implement yet (see https://github.com/microsoft/testfx/issues/2784). Only non-packaged (loose-layout) test hosts can be launched today.
